summary: SE Labour Count and Stock Register features testing completed. All backend APIs (12/12) and frontend UI elements working correctly. Labour Count tab shows category-wise inputs with auto-total, date picker, save button, and history. Stock Register tab shows add material flow, stock entry table with auto-calculated closing (opening+received-used), save button, and current stock level cards.
critical_code_review_comments: The frontend pre-populates entries from labourCountHistory using entry.entries[].type and entry.entries[].label - this works correctly
Stock closing_stock auto-calculation is correctly done in frontend (100+50-20=130 verified)
labourCategories uses contractor_categories API response properly
Note: TEST_Gravel shows -5 closing stock (negative) which is allowed by backend - may want to add UI warning for negative stock
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_Sand and TEST_Gravel inventory entries via backend tests. Labour attendance entries created with Mason/Helper/Electrician categories.
context_for_next_testing_agent: SE Labour Count and Stock Register features fully tested. Key findings: (1) Labour Count tab at /site-engineer/project/{id} has 17 contractor categories from /api/contractor-categories, date picker, category inputs with auto-total, Save Count button, and history section showing prior entries. (2) Stock Register tab has add-material flow (name+unit+Add), stock table with Opening/Received/Used/Closing columns, closing auto-calculated as opening+received-used, Save Stock Register button, and Current Stock Levels cards. (3) Backend stores labour_attendance with contractor_id optional (empty string ok), material_inventory with auto-calculated closing_stock. (4) Tested project: Mr. Vinoth Kumar Babu (first project in SE dashboard), test data includes TEST_Sand (140 cft), TEST_Gravel (-5 cft), Cement (120 bags).

backend_apis.GET /api/contractor-categories: PASS - Returns 17 labour categories (Mason, Electrician, Painter, etc.)
backend_apis.POST /api/labour-attendance (without con: PASS - Saves daily labour count, contractor_id optional
backend_apis.GET /api/labour-attendance/daily-summary: PASS - Returns totals and entries for project+date
backend_apis.POST /api/material-inventory: PASS - Saves stock with auto-calculated closing (opening+received-used)
backend_apis.GET /api/material-inventory/latest: PASS - Returns latest stock per material in project
backend_apis.GET /api/material-inventory: PASS - Returns all stock history for project

frontend_ui.4 tabs present: PASS - Materials, Labours, Labour Count, Stock Register tabs all visible
frontend_ui.Labour Count tab - total counter: PASS - Shows 'Total Workers: X' with auto-calculated sum
frontend_ui.Labour Count tab - history: PASS - Shows 'Entries for YYYY-MM-DD' with prior entries
frontend_ui.Stock Register tab - current stock cards: PASS - data-testid=latest-stock-{name}, shows latest stock levels
